name: AutoModPlus
short: Anti-spam, anti-raid and regex filter (complements Red's Filter/Mod).
description: Automatic moderation: message flood, duplicate/mention/emoji/attachment spam, invite and external link filters, ALL-CAPS detection, regex word filter with per-pattern actions, join-surge (raid) detection with alert/lockdown/kick responses and manual lockdown commands. Per-rule actions (delete/warn/timeout/kick/ban), exempt roles/channels, bilingual (DE/EN), web dashboard integration.
author: Domekologe
install_msg:
Thanks for installing AutoModPlus!

Load it with `[p]load automodplus`, then configure rules via `[p]automodplus` (alias `[p]amp`) or the PDC web dashboard (if installed). All rules are disabled by default.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store any personal data. Spam detection uses transient in-memory counters (timestamps and content hashes) that are discarded on unload/restart. Message content is never persisted.
